name: Wandering Trails: A Hiking Game
short_description: Wandering Trails is a peaceful experience of venturing for a hike in the great outdoors. There are no goals, enemies, jump scares or achievements. There is only you, nature and your trusty old camera.
detailed_description:
The goal of Wandering Trails is to give you a brief escape from your daily routine or a stressful day and let you relax and experience the beauty of nature from within your home. There are no goals or rules. No hand-holding or markers on the horizon. You're free to explore this little world in any way you want and play as mush or as little as you want.


Features:

Beautiful Nature - nearly 20 square kilometres to explore
Dynamic Weather - procedural weather
Day/Night Cycle - dynamic lighting
A Camera - to capture the memorable moments
Wild life - a variety of animals you can come across
